faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything parents want to know

items.question: How long does it take to get a swimming diploma?
items.answer: This depends on age, confidence, and lesson frequency. Most children earn diploma A in 6–12 months with weekly lessons. With Progress+ or private lessons, progress is often faster.

items.question: What should my child bring to the first lesson?
items.answer: A swimsuit, towel, and slippers are enough. For baby & toddler lessons, a swim diaper is required. We provide all floating materials and safety equipment.

items.question: Can parents watch the lessons?
items.answer: Yes! All pools have viewing areas where parents can watch comfortably. For baby & toddler lessons, parents join in the water.

items.question: What if my child is afraid of water?
items.answer: Our instructors are trained in helping anxious swimmers. We start slowly, build trust, and use playful exercises to help children feel safe and confident.

items.question: Do you offer private lessons?
items.answer: Yes, we offer 1‑on‑1 private lessons and duo lessons. These are ideal for faster progress or children who need extra attention.

items.question: What locations do you teach at?
items.answer: We teach in multiple warm, child‑friendly pools across Amsterdam. You can choose the location that works best for your schedule.

faq.more_subtitle: Our team is here to help you with anything related to swimming lessons.

final.title: Ready to begin?
final.subtitle: Enroll your child today for swimming lessons
